project_name.help: Display name for your Django project (e.g. My Project).

project_slug.help: Python package name. Press Enter to auto-generate from the project name.

license.help: Choose MIT, BEER, or None (no LICENSE file).

postgres_user.help: Database user for local Docker Compose and .env defaults.

postgres_password.help: Database password for local Docker Compose and .env defaults.

use_jwt.help: Adds users + authentication apps, JWT settings, and token endpoints.

use_sentry.help: Adds sentry-sdk and settings. Only activates when SENTRY_DSN is set in .env.

use_vscode.help: Adds .vscode/settings.json and recommended extensions for Django development.

use_pgadmin.prompt: Include pgAdmin in dev Docker Compose [y/N]
use_pgadmin.help: Adds pgAdmin at http://localhost:5050 for database management.

use_redis.help: Adds Redis to dev Docker Compose and django-redis cache backend.

use_rabbitmq.help: Adds RabbitMQ as the message broker. Required when Celery is enabled.

use_celery.help: Adds Celery worker + beat, task config, and production Docker services. Requires RabbitMQ.

use_code_style.help: Adds Ruff, pre-commit git hooks, and pyproject.toml (replaces flake8-only setup).
